channel.title: Pricing Strategies on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Pricing Strategies on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Set Freelancer Rates Without Undervaluing Yourself
item.description: How to Set Freelancer Rates Without Undervaluing Yourself You’re a freelancer, and you’ve got skills people need. But every time a potential client asks for a quote, you freeze. Are you charging too much and scaring them off? Or too little and leaving money on the table? Figuring out your rates feels like a guessing game, and writing proposals that actually win projects is even harder. If you’re tired of second-guessing your worth or losing gigs to competitors, let’s fix this.
